test_cases.cleaned_text: I went for a long walk in the morning and felt calm afterward.
Read an article about France in the morning. Later watched a tutorial about Notion. The two had nothing in common.
Built MindGraph using Figma over the weekend.
Met Rahul at the Bengaluru office for the design review.
I worked on MindGraph using LangGraph in the afternoon. Made good progress on the dedup node.
Spent the morning at Inspiral with Sahana working on MindGraph using Cursor. Felt productive.
Naveen recommended Slack for team coordination at Simplico. Said the async culture works well there.
Started planning the Goa retreat with Priya. We'll use Notion for the itinerary and book flights through Cleartrip.
Joined Simplico as a contractor. Manuel onboarded me. We use Notion for docs, Slack for chat, GitHub for code, and Linear for tickets. The team sits in the Bengaluru office.
Pitched MindGraph to Anthropic. Built it with Python, LangGraph, Supabase, pgvector, and React. Demo went well. Sridhar joined the call from the Mumbai office.
